steps.title: Target the debut facts
steps.content: The question asks for a sentence that emphasizes when and where Argentum debuted. The useful notes are the year, 2018, and the place, New York City, New York.

steps.title: Keep the focus narrow
steps.content: Details about Quispe's nationality, her usual large-scale light sculptures, the LED domes, and the work's size may be accurate, but they do not directly emphasize both parts of the debut.

steps.title: Eliminate the off-task choices
steps.content:
• A: emphasizes materials and size while leaving out the location.
  • B: gives only general background about the artist's work with light.
  • C: puts the year at the start and includes New York City as the place of debut.
  • D: includes the year only as a parenthetical detail and leaves out the location.
The answer is C.
